sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n15194" key="a)rktiko/s3" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀρκτικός</orth> (C), <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">ἄρχω</etym>) <sense id="n15194.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">imperious,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1764.tlg001:9:16" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Vett.Val.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.16</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
